about.description: Atmecs Global's India footprint covers Hyderabad, spanning R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all seventeen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Atmecs Global operate in India?
faq.a: Atmecs Global operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Atmecs Global have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Atmecs Global's India GCC presence is in Hyderabad.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Atmecs Global run in India?
faq.a: Atmecs Global runs R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Atmecs Global's India GCCs?
faq.a: Atmecs Global's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Atmecs Global's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 17 leaders at Atmecs Global's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
